name: Ginger-Mushroom Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms and slice them. Set aside.
2. In a large frying pan, heat the butter and oil over medium heat.
3. Add the mushrooms and remaining ingredients to the pan.
4. Saute for 3 to 5 minutes or until the mushrooms are tender.
5. Serve with grilled steak or chicken.
Source: Chatelaine Magazine. Sept. 96 Issue
